feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ORDRSP/ORDERS05 IDoc Not Validating Plant (WERKS) in E1EDP01 Segment
entry.content: We are using inbound ORDRSP / ORDERS05 (process code: ORDR) to update order confirmations for delivery schedules. However, the plant (WERKS) in segment E1EDP01 is not being validated. Even if an incorrect plant is sent, the IDoc is processed successfully.  Is there an option in standard SAP functionally to validate the plant code on the IDOC for ORDRSP / ORDERS05 ?

entry.title: Transfer an Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) from one company code to another
entry.content: Accounting may need to transfer an Asset Retirement Obligation (ARO) from one company code to another.  How would they accomplish that?

entry.title: Pop up Address field issue in Sales order
entry.content:
Hello Team,

we have Ship to party where have multiple address, while create sales order once update Sold to and Ship to party Address POP up ( Standard) is coming.

in that very limited data showing like Street, Postel code and Country but we need additional fields like Floor number, Building number, Region, City from respective address.

but in this standard POPup the required information is missing

entry.title: System is not blocking GR with 103 movt type
entry.content: With 101 movement type, system is giving error during goods receipt against PO if source inspection lot UD is pending or rejected. We are using here 103 movement type for goods receipt against PO. System is not restricting GR against PO if source inspection lot is pending or rejected with 103 movement type. Is there any standard solution available to solve this issue? Is there any config change for 103 movement type so that it behaves like 101 movement type for source inspection?

entry.title: Verknüpfung von Kunden mit Lieferanten in einem Geschäftspartner bei Erstdatenübernahme
entry.content:
Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,

es gibt von Ihnen  einen  Hinweis mit der Nummer 2363892, den wir gerne nutzen würden, weil wir vor einer Vollmigration stehen.

Was kann ich machen, damit ich den genannten Hinweis in das System bekomme?

MfG
Andreas

entry.title: About the successor features to KAK2
entry.content:
We learned from the Readiness Check that KAK2 is a function that will be discontinued when upgrading to 2025 FPS01.

Although SAP Note 3212819 was listed as a related note, we could not find any relevant information when searching for it in the New Features Viewer.

With the discontinuation of KAK2, is there any successor functionality available?
Or is the overall SAP direction to no longer support mass updates of Statistical Key Figures, meaning that no successor function exists?

Additionally, it appears that the function itself is still usable in 2025 FPS01. Could you please clarify whether it will remain available in this version, or if it will become unavailable after a certain period

entry.title: Version Completed checkbox to be mandate - PO creation
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

When modifying the PO, getting new line item in versions in header. 
But getting error if not choosed Reason in standard, But not getting error for "Completed" checkbox, if not ticked.  We need to put validation for that field "Version completed" checkbox should be ticked. 

Please help

entry.title: Need to activate mid month deprecation after go-live
entry.content:
We want to activate mid month depreciation config in middle of the year after go-live.

Please suggest and guide us ho we can do this?

entry.title: How to use ERS with Service PO
entry.content:
How to use ERS with Service PO?

Service PO does not have Goods receipt, so how can we use ERS/transaction MRER to invoice these POs?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Prenotification (Test Bank Transfer)
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We are able to successfully generate ACH prenotification runs and view the
associated “List of Changed Bank Data.”

However, we need clarification on the payment medium output:

1. Where is the ACH prenotification (NACHA) file stored after generation
   (logical file path / physical directory on the application server)?

2. Which standard configuration determines the file path and filename?

3. Is it standard SAP behavior that the ACH formatted file is not displayed
   on the prenotification screens and is only available as a physical file
   (e.g. via AL11 / application logs)?

Requesting confirmation of standard SAP behavior and documentation reference.

Regards,

Rishi

entry.title: The condition class in S4 HANA is not created BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 but it is in R3
entry.content:
Good morning everyone.
Currently, my client is in the process of migrating to S/4HANA. We have a program Z that creates sales orders (VA01) through the BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2. The program fills in all the required fields of the BAPI (it enters four condition classes per item), but after creating the order, it does so without the ZCGM condition, which is manually configured as mandatory for a specific order class, ZC06. If I create the order manually using VA01, SAP prompts me to enter the ZCGM condition class since it is mandatory, and it creates the other classes without problems.

The curious thing here is that this same BAPI is used in R/3, and the same fields are filled in, but the order is created using the ZCGM condition class.

I have seen that at the configuration level, everything is OK in both R/3 and S/4HANA. I performed standard debugging on the BAPI and verified that the condition is never lost, but for some reason, it's not created in S4 HANA when other condition classes are added. If only the ZCGM class is used, it creates it without problems, but the client needs to add other condition classes as well.

S4 HANA order created through BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2  (The ZCGM condition is not present.)

Order created in R3 with the same data and using BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2( if created with condition ZCGM )

 

Data that I enter in conditions for the BAPI in both S4 HANA and R3 environments.

We have also tried setting a value in LOGICAL_SWITCH-PRICING but it doesn't work for us in S4 HANA either.

entry.title: Co-Product Cost Estimate Not Matching Apportionment Structure Percentage in Plant P001
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

While running the standard cost estimate for the header material 31000001 and co-product material 31000005 in plant P001, the cost estimate is not being calculated according to the apportionment structure percentage maintained in the header material.

Expected Cost Distribution (Total Cost: 320):

  • 31000001 – 60% → 192
  • 31000005 – 40% → 128

System Calculated Values:

  • 31000001 → 184.00
  • 31000005 → 136.00

The system is not distributing the costs as per the defined apportionment structure percentages.

For your reference I have attached step by step how to reproduce the issue.

 

System: DEV 110 Test system.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Mastan Shaik

entry.title: Stock transfer price differs in supplying and receiving plant
entry.content:
Greetings,

My client has a requirement where stock in supplying plant M121 at cost 1000 INR after manufacturing, however the market rate is 700, and receiving plant have a demand they need stock from Supplying plant at market price, so it avoids buying from external vendor at market price ,  so can  provide the solution or end to end set up such scenarios in SAP MM

entry.title: F110_Vendor Debit line items not pick up in Payment proposal
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

While processing the vendor payment through F110, system does not picking the vendor debit line items in payment proposal.

I have attached the document with details of the issue and test case.

Regards, 

Venkatesh

entry.title: BAPI/FM/API for KKPAN in SAP S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We are not able to find the suitable BAPI/Function Module/API for the transaction "KKPAN" to create a program to perform the unit costing for mass materials.

Kindly check and help us to provide the requested information.

Best Regards..!! 

Linga swamy

entry.title: How to update code page in payment medium format
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Good day!!

We would like to know where and how to update code page value (4110) for Payment medium format(Table - TFPM042FFC). Please let us know and find the attached screenshot from CHD system - client 200 sysem where we have mainted via debug mode your reference. Same value we have to maintain in CHD system and client 100 

Thank you,

V.Sudharsana rao.

entry.title: We need to read purchase requisition header text in email notification in PR flexible workflow
entry.content:
For workflow scenario WS02000458, we need to read purchase requisition header text (Text Object : EBANH, Text ID : B01) and send that in email notification in PR flexible workflow. Is there any standard CDS view available which can be used to read the purchase requisition header text. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to extend Display Purchase Order - F7117
entry.content:
Hi Team

We have a requirement to extend Object page of the Fiori app – Display Purchase Order (F7117) by adding a new Facet to display the list of Freight Vendor for a Purchase Order. But we are facing challenge while extending. Details are provided below.

 

 

Requirement – Extend Object page of the Fiori app – Display Purchase Order (F7117) by adding a new Facet to display the list of Freight Vendor for a Purchase Order.

 

 

 

Approach – Since this application is built using CDS and UI annotations, we have tried to extend the standard CDS view ‘C_PurchaseOrderFs’ which is used in this ODATA service – ‘C_PURCHASEORDER_FS_SRV’.

 

Issue – After extending the CDS view, association is not showing up in the $metadata and new Facet is not coming up in the Fiori app

 

Below is the code snippet.

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'ZEXT1'

@EndUserText.label: 'Extend C_PurchaseOrderFs'

extend view C_PurchaseOrderFs with ZEXT_C_PurchaseOrderFs

association [0..*] to ZC_FREIGHT as _Supplier6 on _Supplier6.PurchaseOrder = $projection.purchaseorder

{

      @ui.facet: [

      {

        id: 'FreightVendorFacet',

        type: #LINEITEM_REFERENCE,

        label: 'Freight Vendors',

        position: 100,

        targetElement: '_Supplier6'

      }

    ]

   

//    _HeaderExtension.knumv,

//    _HeaderExtension._Supplier2,

//    I_PurchaseOrderEnhanced.PD5,

//    _Supplier5,

cast('1234' as abap.char( 4 )) as test,  //Ignore this line of code

 

 

    _Supplier6

}

 

 

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZCFREIGHT'

@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true

@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'ZC Freight'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

define view ZC_FREIGHT as select from ZEXT_FREIGHT

{

    key PurchaseOrder,

    key DocumentCondition,

    @ui.lineItem: [{

           label: 'Vendor',

           position: 10,

           importance: #HIGH }]   

    key FreightVendor,

    @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'

    @ui.lineItem: [{

           label: 'Amount',

           position: 20,

           importance: #HIGH }]   

    FreightAmount,

    @Semantics.currencyCode: true   

    Currency

   

}

 

 

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewName: 'ZPRFREIGHT'

@AbapCatalog.compiler.compareFilter: true

@AbapCatalog.preserveKey: true

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'Freight'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

define view ZEXT_FREIGHT as select from ekko a

inner join prcd_elements as b on a.knumv = b.knumv

//association [0..*] to prcd_elements as prcd on po.knumv = prcd.knumv

{

//    @ui.facet: [

//                {

//                    label: 'Frieght Charges',

//                    id: 'Frieght Charges',

//                    parentId: 'GeneralInformation',

//                    type: #IDENTIFICATION_REFERENCE,

//                    position: 10

//                  }

//                  ]

//   @Consumption.filter.hidden: true

 

 

    key a. ebeln as PurchaseOrder,

    key b. knumv as DocumentCondition,

//    @ui.lineItem: [{

//           label: 'Vendor',

//           position: 10,

//           importance: #HIGH }]

    key b.lifnr as FreightVendor,

    @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'Currency'

//    @ui.lineItem: [{

//           label: 'Amount',

//           position: 20,

//           importance: #HIGH }]

    sum(b.kwert) as FreightAmount,

//    @Semantics.currencyCode: true

    b.waerk as Currency

}

where b.kntyp = 'B'

group by a.ebeln, b.knumv, b.lifnr, b.waerk

 

 

Regards

Pranam

entry.title: Do you think your current ERP setup supports or limits your AI initiatives?
entry.content: I feel like ERP can either really help or quietly get in the way of AI. Curious how it’s working for you.

entry.title: At what point does ERP complexity start affecting business performance?
entry.content: At some point ERP complexity just starts slowing everything down… wondering when that usually hits for others.
